caribbean.headline: Heavy Rain and Moderate Winds Impact St. Maarten Today
caribbean.paragraph: St. Maarten is experiencing moderate easterly winds at 20 kt with wave heights reaching 4.3 ft and a 7-second swell period from the ESE. Rain chances are high with a 69% rain probability, while San Juan sees lighter winds near 17 kt and less intense conditions.

mediterranean.headline: Heavy Rain and Rough Seas Impact Cadiz Today
mediterranean.paragraph: Cadiz is experiencing strong westerly winds up to 22 kt with wave heights reaching 7.6 ft and a swell period of 13 seconds. Rain probability is high at 98%, creating challenging conditions for maritime operations, while Lisbon sees lighter winds of 17 kt and less than 10% rain probability.
